creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
It would have helped if I had attached the patch to the previous message, wouldn't it?  Here it is.

--- On Mon, 7/7/08, bf <bf2006a@yahoo.com> wrote:

> From: bf <bf2006a@yahoo.com>
> Subject: ports/125166: [PATCH]www/links: update to 2.1pre37
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, demon@FreeBSD.org
> Date: Monday, July 7, 2008, 10:15 AM
> Please consider the following patch instead: it updates
> links to a more recent version, which, among other things,
> contains an important security fix for those using proxies.
>  In the new patch I bumped PORTEPOCH, because the Ports
> version-parsing code erroneously concludes that 2.1pre37 is
> the 37th patched version of 2.1, rather than a prerelease
> version predating 2.1.
> 
> Regards,  
>         b.f.
